dataset_name: Global Solar Atlas — PV Output & GHI
policy_design_purpose: Calibrate mandate stringency by zone; set minimum system size expectations based on local solar resource (GHI and PVOUT)
notes: ~1km resolution sufficient for zoning-level policy design

policy_design_purpose: Estimate aggregate building stock density; identify high-density areas suitable for rooftop mandates vs. low-density areas
notes: Useful as aggregate proxy but not building-level

policy_design_purpose: Estimate beneficiary population per zone; size residential demand; weight equity scoring
notes: Key input for equity-weighted incentive design

policy_design_purpose: Classify urban vs. peri-urban vs. rural zones to define mandate applicability boundaries
notes: Helps define policy perimeter

policy_design_purpose: Identify low-income neighborhoods for equity-weighted IPTU Sustentável incentives; housing quality indicators for retrofit targeting
notes: Explicitly referenced in intervention document for equity targeting

policy_design_purpose: Distinguish built-up from non-built areas; identify green space for hybrid solar+NbS installations
notes: High resolution helpful for land-use segmentation

policy_design_purpose: Derive roof slope proxies at block level; identify terrain constraints for panel orientation assumptions
notes: Slope derived layer also available in repo

policy_design_purpose: Identify zones where solar mandates should require flood resilience measures or be phased
notes: Use moderate scenario for near-term policy design

policy_design_purpose: Long-term risk screening for 25-year PV system lifespan under high-emission scenario
notes: Worst-case for long-lived infrastructure

policy_design_purpose: Current flood risk baseline for policy calibration
notes: Baseline reference

policy_design_purpose: Spatially differentiate PV performance derating due to temperature; identify zones needing adjusted yield expectations
notes: 0.3-0.5% efficiency loss per degree above 25°C

policy_design_purpose: Long-term temperature baseline for PV performance modeling
notes: Complements 2024 snapshot

policy_design_purpose: Identify areas with growing cooling demand where solar+efficiency bundles should be prioritized in policy
notes: Links solar mandate to cooling demand co-benefits

policy_design_purpose: Proxy for grid infrastructure density; identify potentially grid-constrained areas
notes: Low-resolution proxy — actual grid data preferred

policy_design_purpose: Locate transmission lines and substations; estimate grid connection proximity for mandate feasibility
notes: Transmission-level only — distribution grid not included

policy_design_purpose: Identify existing energy facilities for cumulative grid impact assessment
notes: Complements power infrastructure layer

policy_design_purpose: Validate flood risk models with observed 2024 flood extent; exclude severely flood-damaged areas from near-term mandates
notes: Porto Alegre specific flood event data

policy_design_purpose: Identify green spaces for hybrid solar+green roof incentives under certification program
notes: Referenced in certification program (solar + NbS combo)

policy_design_purpose: Assess workforce accessibility for installation/maintenance services; equity indicator for transit-dependent populations
notes: Secondary relevance for policy design

dataset_name: Individual Building Footprints with Roof Area
policy_design_purpose: Estimate per-building rooftop area for mandate sizing; distinguish residential vs. commercial by footprint size; calculate total installable capacity
external_source_if_missing: OpenStreetMap or Microsoft Building Footprints or Google Open Buildings
notes: Essential for building-level mandate — GHSL 100m is too coarse for individual rooftop assessment

policy_design_purpose: Segment building stock into residential and commercial for differentiated mandate rules and targets
external_source_if_missing: Porto Alegre Municipal Cadaster (Cadastro Imobiliário — PMPA/SMF)
notes: Needed to apply different mandate thresholds per segment; may be available via PMPA open data portal

dataset_name: PDDUA Zoning Map — Porto Alegre Master Plan
policy_design_purpose: Define where mandates can legally apply; align building code updates with permitted land uses and building types
external_source_if_missing: Secretaria Municipal de Planejamento (SMP) — Porto Alegre
notes: Essential regulatory layer; PDDUA defines floor-area ratios and height limits that affect rooftop availability

policy_design_purpose: Identify grid hosting capacity constraints; define zones where mandates need storage requirements or phased rollout
notes: Night lights are a poor proxy — actual feeder capacity data needed for mandate feasibility

policy_design_purpose: Map existing solar installations to identify adoption gaps; avoid mandating what already exists; calibrate incentive levels
notes: ANEEL publishes this data; needs geocoding from address to coordinates

policy_design_purpose: Target building code mandate (Sub-action 6.4) to areas with active new development; forecast mandate uptake
external_source_if_missing: Secretaria Municipal de Planejamento (SMP) — Porto Alegre
notes: Critical for building code mandate which only applies to new construction

policy_design_purpose: Exclude or create special provisions for listed buildings and historic districts where panel installation is restricted
notes: Porto Alegre has significant historic center — mandate must respect preservation rules

policy_design_purpose: Calibrate IPTU Sustentável incentive levels based on local consumption and payback periods; identify high-consumption commercial zones
external_source_if_missing: CEEE Equatorial or ANEEL statistical data
notes: Consumption data drives payback calculation which drives incentive calibration

policy_design_purpose: Design graduated tax incentive (IPTU Sustentável) — need property values to model fiscal impact of tax reductions per zone
external_source_if_missing: Secretaria Municipal da Fazenda (SMF) — Porto Alegre
notes: Needed to model fiscal cost of IPTU Sustentável program per zone

policy_design_purpose: Assess structural suitability for retrofit solar installations; older buildings may need roof reinforcement
external_source_if_missing: Porto Alegre Municipal Cadaster or IBGE Census (housing characteristics)
notes: Important for retrofit mandate — old roofs may not support panels without structural work

dataset_name: Roof Orientation and Tilt (LiDAR or DSM)
policy_design_purpose: Precise rooftop solar potential modeling — orientation azimuth and tilt angle affect generation by 10-30%
external_source_if_missing: Municipal LiDAR survey or high-resolution DSM (e.g. AW3D or commercial providers)
notes: Ideal but expensive; can approximate with DEM + building footprints for pre-feasibility

policy_design_purpose: Identify areas with environmental restrictions that may limit construction or mandate scope (riparian zones; hilltop protection)
notes: Brazilian environmental law (Código Florestal) defines APPs — relevant where buildings border water or steep terrain

policy_design_purpose: Target enhanced incentives to energy-poor households; align IPTU Sustentável with social tariff eligibility
notes: Can be derived from br_ibge income data + ANEEL social tariff data; enhances equity targeting
